metadata.title: KYC/KYB Data Collection
metadata.description: Collect and manage KYC and KYB data for Bridge API submission

apiErrors.IP_ACCESS_DENIED: Access denied from your IP address
apiErrors.LINK_EXPIRED: Link has expired or is no longer valid
apiErrors.INIT_FAILED: Failed to initialize. Please try again.

auth.termsAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our
auth.confirmationSent: We've sent you a confirmation link. Please check your email and click the link to verify your account.

home.title: KYC/KYB Data Collection
home.description: Collect and manage customer verification data for individuals and businesses. All data is encrypted and stored securely.
home.individualDescription: Collect verification data for individual customers including personal information, identification documents, and address verification.
home.businessDescription: Collect verification data for business customers including company information, beneficial owners, and business documents.
home.securityAes: AES-256 encryption for all sensitive data (SSN, EIN, documents)
home.securityValidation: File validation with magic bytes to prevent MIME spoofing
home.securityCleanup: Data cleanup after Bridge API submission

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: View and manage collected KYC/KYB data
dashboard.embeddableDescription: Create shareable links and embed KYC forms directly into your website or application. Collect customer data seamlessly with customizable branding and real-time webhook notifications.
dashboard.gettingStartedDescription: Create embeddable KYC links to collect customer verification data. Each link can be shared directly or embedded as an iframe in your application.

links.title: Verification Links
links.subtitle: Create embeddable verification links for your applications
links.step1: Create a new embed link by clicking "Create Embed Link"
links.step2: Copy the iframe code and paste it into your website
links.step3: Users will complete verification directly in your app
links.step4: Receive webhook notifications when verification is complete
links.noLinksDescription: Create your first embed link to start collecting KYC data
links.linkReadyToUse: Your KYC embed link is ready to use
links.pasteIntoWebsite: Paste this into your website HTML
links.domainsHelp: Comma-separated. Leave empty to allow all domains.

linkDetails.noDataDescription: The user has not completed the verification form yet.
linkDetails.shareToCollect: Share the link to collect verification data.
linkDetails.sensitiveInfoWarning: This data contains personal information. Handle with care and in accordance with your privacy policy.
linkDetails.dataRetention: Data retention: This data will be automatically deleted on
linkDetails.dataMayBeDeleted: The data may have been deleted.
linkDetails.embedCodeDescription: Copy this code and paste it into your website to embed the verification form.
linkDetails.jsEventsDescription: Listen for these events from the embedded form:
linkDetails.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this link? This cannot be undone.
linkDetails.confirmDelete:
Are you sure you want to delete this verification link?

This will permanently delete:
- The verification link
- All submitted form data
- Associated customer records

This action cannot be undone.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive real-time notifications when KYC events occur
webhooks.webhooksDescription: Webhooks allow you to receive real-time HTTP POST notifications when events occur in your KYC links.
webhooks.signatureHeader: Requests include a signature header for verification
webhooks.retriedDeliveries: Failed deliveries are retried up to 3 times
webhooks.addWebhookDescription: Add a webhook endpoint to receive real-time notifications
webhooks.signingSecretHelp: Enter a secret to sign webhook payloads
webhooks.signingSecretNote: We'll include a signature header so you can verify webhooks are from us

kycForm.secureProcessing: Your information is encrypted and securely processed.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.subtitle: Please provide your personal details as they appear on your ID.
personalInfo.ageRequirement: You must be at least 18 years old
personalInfo.occupationHelp: Your current or most recent occupation
personalInfo.intermediaryHelp: Check this box if you are acting on behalf of a third party (not for your own account).

identification.title: Identification
identification.subtitle: Please provide your tax ID number and a government-issued photo ID.
identification.taxIdDescription: Your tax ID helps us verify your identity and is required for regulatory compliance. This information is encrypted and securely stored.
identification.governmentIdDescription: Please upload a clear photo or scan of your government-issued ID. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF (max 15MB).
identification.invalidFileType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF file.
identification.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 15MB.

addressForm.title: Residential Address
addressForm.description: Enter your current residential address. PO boxes are not accepted.
addressForm.poBoxWarning: PO boxes are not accepted. Please provide a physical street address.

documents.title: Supporting Documents
documents.subtitle: Upload any supporting documents that may help verify your identity. These documents are optional but may speed up the verification process.
documents.documentsUploaded: {count, plural, one {# document uploaded} other {# documents uploaded}}
documents.canAddMoreOrProceed: You can add more documents or proceed to the next step.
documents.uploadToExpedite: Upload documents if requested or to expedite your verification.
documents.invalidFileType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF file.
documents.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 24MB.

proof_of_address.label: Proof of Address
proof_of_address.description: Utility bill, bank statement, or government letter (within last 3 months)

proof_of_source_of_funds.label: Proof of Source of Funds
proof_of_source_of_funds.description: Bank statements, pay stubs, or investment records showing fund origin

proof_of_source_of_wealth.label: Proof of Source of Wealth
proof_of_source_of_wealth.description: Documentation showing how you accumulated your wealth

proof_of_tax_identification.label: Proof of Tax Identification
proof_of_tax_identification.description: Tax return, IRS letter, or official tax document

proof_of_account_purpose.label: Proof of Account Purpose
proof_of_account_purpose.description: Documentation supporting your stated account purpose

proof_of_individual_name_change.label: Proof of Name Change
proof_of_individual_name_change.description: Marriage certificate, court order, or legal name change document

proof_of_relationship.label: Proof of Relationship
proof_of_relationship.description: Document proving relationship (for transfers to family/friends)

tips.title: Document Tips:
tips.clear: Ensure documents are clear and readable
tips.recent: Documents should be recent (within 3 months for address proof)
tips.matchDetails: Personal information should match your submitted details
tips.formats: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, PDF (max 24MB)

reviewStep.title: Review Your Information
reviewStep.subtitle: Please review your information before submitting. Click Edit to make changes.
reviewStep.actingAsIntermediary: Acting as intermediary on behalf of a third party
reviewStep.byClickingSubmit: By clicking Submit, you confirm that:
reviewStep.confirmAccurate: All information provided is accurate and complete
reviewStep.confirmAuthorize: You authorize verification of your identity
reviewStep.confirmTerms: You agree to the terms of service and privacy policy

businessInfo.title: Business Information
businessInfo.subtitle: Please provide your business details as they appear on official registration documents.
businessInfo.isDao: This is a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO)
businessInfo.websiteRequired: Required unless you provide proof of nature of business document
businessInfo.businessDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe what your business does...
businessInfo.intermediaryForThirdParties: Acting as intermediary for third parties
businessInfo.intermediaryHelp: Check if you will be acting on behalf of other parties
businessInfo.prohibitedHelp: Check if you have operations in sanctioned countries
businessInfo.highRiskSelect: Select all activities that apply to your business
businessInfo.highRiskPlaceholder: Describe your involvement in these activities, licenses held, compliance measures, etc.
businessInfo.moneyServicesHelp: Check if you offer payment processing, money transmission, or similar financial services
businessInfo.usesBridgeForMoney: Will use Bridge for money services
businessInfo.bridgeHelp: Check if Bridge will be used as part of your money services offering
businessInfo.moneyServicesPlaceholder: Describe the money services you provide...
businessInfo.compliancePlaceholder: Describe your AML/KYC procedures, screening tools, and compliance controls...
businessInfo.regulatoryDescription: If your business is regulated, provide details below

kybReviewStep.title: Review Your Information
kybReviewStep.subtitle: Please review all business information before submitting. Click Edit to make changes.
kybReviewStep.byClickingSubmit: By clicking Submit, you confirm that:
kybReviewStep.confirmAccurate: All information provided is accurate and complete
kybReviewStep.confirmAuthorized: You are authorized to represent this business
kybReviewStep.confirmVerification: You authorize verification of the business and associated persons
kybReviewStep.confirmTerms: You agree to the terms of service and privacy policy

kybOwners.title: Beneficial Owners & Control Persons
kybOwners.subtitle: List all individuals who own {threshold}% or more of the business, control persons, and authorized signers.
kybOwners.requireControlPerson: At least one control person (officer, director, or manager)
kybOwners.clickToAdd: Click the button above to add beneficial owners and control persons.

kybAddress.title: Business Addresses
kybAddress.subtitle: Provide both your registered (legal) address and physical business location.
kybAddress.registeredHelp: Official address registered with government authorities
kybAddress.physicalHelp: Where your business actually operates (no PO boxes)
kybAddress.sameAsRegistered: Physical address is the same as registered address
kybAddress.poBoxWarning: PO boxes are not accepted for the physical address. Please provide a street address where your business operates.

kybDocuments.title: Business Documents
kybDocuments.subtitle: Upload required business documents for verification. Accepted formats: PDF, JPEG, PNG (max 24MB each).
kybDocuments.requiredDocs: Business Formation and Ownership documents are required.
kybDocuments.tipClear: Ensure all documents are clear and legible
kybDocuments.tipRecent: Documents should be recent (within 3 months for address proof)
kybDocuments.tipComplete: All pages of multi-page documents should be included
kybDocuments.tipMatch: Names and details should match your business information
kybDocuments.invalidFileType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or PDF file.
kybDocuments.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 24MB.

business_formation.label: Business Formation Documents
business_formation.description: Articles of Incorporation, Operating Agreement, Certificate of Organization, etc.

ownership_information.label: Ownership Information
ownership_information.description: Cap table, membership interests, or ownership certificate showing all owners

ownership_chart.label: Ownership Chart
ownership_chart.description: Visual diagram of ownership structure (if complex)

directors_registry.label: Directors Registry
directors_registry.description: Official list of directors or officers of the company

certificate_of_good_standing.label: Certificate of Good Standing
certificate_of_good_standing.description: Recent certificate from state showing business is in good standing

proof_of_nature_of_business.label: Proof of Nature of Business
proof_of_nature_of_business.description: Documentation proving your business activities (required if no website)

proof_of_business_address.label: Proof of Business Address
proof_of_business_address.description: Utility bill, bank statement, or lease agreement (within last 3 months)

proof_of_source_of_funds.label: Proof of Source of Funds
proof_of_source_of_funds.description: Bank statements, investment records, or loan documentation

proof_of_tax_identification.label: Proof of Tax Identification
proof_of_tax_identification.description: IRS Letter 147C, EIN confirmation, or equivalent tax document

flow_of_funds_diagram.label: Flow of Funds Diagram
flow_of_funds_diagram.description: Diagram showing how funds flow through your business (required for money services)

aml_comfort_letter.label: AML Comfort Letter
aml_comfort_letter.description: Letter from auditor or compliance officer confirming AML program

adminRedirect.kycAdminMessage: As an admin, you should create embeddable KYC links for users to fill out their verification data. Direct data entry is reserved for users accessing their verification links.
adminRedirect.kybAdminMessage: As an admin, you should create embeddable KYB links for businesses to fill out their verification data. Direct data entry is reserved for users accessing their verification links.
adminRedirect.redirecting: Redirecting you to the links page...

footer.secureStorage: Data is encrypted and stored securely

errors.linkNotValid: Link is not valid or has expired

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {count} characters

accountPurpose.payments_to_friends_or_family_abroad: Payments to friends or family abroad
